title: Fermented Greek Celery Stir-fry
description: A crisp and fermented solo-dinner greek dish featuring roasted celery salt, perfect for raw-friendly meals.
instructions: Chop the celery stalks into small pieces. Slice the garlic and ginger.
Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl, ensuring every piece of celery is well coated with the mixture.
Spread the celery evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the celery for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Stir occasionally to ensure even browning.
After roasting, mix in sesame seeds and minced garlic-ginger for extra flavor.
Serve immediately as a side dish or as a solo-dinner meal.
